plans.name: Weekly Plan
plans.desc: Perfect for trying us out — 7 days of fresh meals.
plans.features:
1 meal daily for 7 days
Rotating breakfast & lunch menu
Free home delivery
Pause or skip any day

plans.name: Monthly Plan
plans.desc: Our best value — 30 days of homemade goodness.
plans.features:
1 meal daily for 30 days
Full menu rotation (breakfast & lunch)
Free priority delivery
Pause, skip or modify anytime
Save ₹500 vs weekly

plans.name: Custom Plan
plans.desc: Two meals a day, family plans or special diets.
plans.features:
2 meals daily (breakfast + lunch)
Family & couple options
Diet-specific customisation
Dedicated WhatsApp support
